name: rship-ais-cloudflare-workers
description: RSHIP AGI Systems — Cloudflare Worker Network: 6 AI Agent workers + 6 Bot workers (Slack, Workflow, Cron, Alerts, Enterprise Control, Broadcast)

scripts.deploy:agents: npm run deploy:cerebrum && npm run deploy:animus && npm run deploy:agens && npm run deploy:nexus && npm run deploy:vigil && npm run deploy:cursor
scripts.deploy:bots: npm run deploy:herald && npm run deploy:conduit && npm run deploy:pulse && npm run deploy:sentinel && npm run deploy:imperium && npm run deploy:nuntius
scripts.deploy:slack: npm run deploy:herald && npm run deploy:imperium && npm run deploy:nuntius
scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:agents && npm run deploy:bots
